prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年海南省综合类最低位次分别为约2231名→1997名→2661名→761名→467名。2021–2023年位次在2000–2700名区间波动，2024年起因选科要求调整为物理+ 化学必选且取消不限选科组，位次大幅跃升至761名；2025年进一步缩招至12人，位次继续上升至467名。近两年累计前移约2194名，竞争显著加剧；该校在海南 省综合类招生计划：2021–2024年均为23人，2025年骤降至12人（缩招约48%），2026年进一步缩至8人，较2025年再缩招约33%。连续两年大幅缩招，供给端明 显收紧，对位次有向上推升作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西北工业大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年位列第23名（2025年第21名、2024年第23名） ，稳居全国顶尖高校行列，属于国防七子之一，在考生中具有极高的认可度和吸引力；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及校园安全事件（学生被地方 黑恶势力殴打、校方被指偏袒不作为），但抖音热度总排名第74位（评价为一般），短视频曝光以余承东演讲、大国重器等正面内容为主，整体舆情对报考意愿影响有限。历史投 档异常文件中未出现该校断档记录，录取走势较为稳定；第五轮学科评估中，航空宇航科学与技术A+、材料科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A+、机械工程A、 信息与通信工程A-、控制科学与工程A-、管理科学与工程A-，共7个A-及以上学科（其中3个A+）。航空、计算机、材料等王牌专业与当前社会热门方向高度契合，对高分考生吸引 力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业在2024–2026年持续高热推荐，航空航天相关专业因大国重器背景关注度居高不下；海南 省2026年高考报名人数约78,000人（较2025年67,408人增长约15.7%），考生规模大幅增加，竞争进一步加剧；西北工业大学位于陕西省西安市，与海南省距离较远，但作为国防七子顶尖985，跨省吸引力不受地域限制；该校在海南招生占比极小（2025年仅12人），属于 典型的外省优质高校招生，受本省考生规模变化影响较大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次467名、2026年招生计划继续缩招至8人（供给收紧推高位次）、海南省考生总数 大幅增长约15.7%（需求竞争加剧推高位次），以及该校顶尖985层次和强势学科对高分考生的持续吸引力，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基础上继续前移但幅度收窄。预测最 低位次约394名，区间335–453名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 航空航天类（智慧三航拔尖班）
- 计算机类（计算机科学国家拔尖计划班）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
2026年海南省仅招收上述2个专业，均为该校最顶尖王牌专业，无中等难度专业。建议将两个专业均视为一档冲刺。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
暂无。2026年海南省仅招收2个顶尖专业，无相对好进专业。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年西北工业大学在海南省仅招收2个专业（航空航天类智慧三航拔尖班6人、计算机类国家拔尖计划班2人），均为该校最顶尖的王牌专业。位次在预测区间335–394名以内可 重点冲刺，位次优于335名则录取把握较大；位次在394–453名区间可作为冲刺志愿。由于招生人数极少（仅8人），建议考生结合自身位次合理定位，将两个专业均作为冲刺目标 。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Hainan Province comprehensive category were approximately 2231 → 1997 → 2661 → 761 → 467. Rankings fluctuated between 2000 and 2700 from 2021 to 2023. Starting in 2024, due to the adjustment of subject requirements to mandatory Physics + Chemistry and the cancellation of the unrestricted subject group, rankings jumped significantly to 761; in 2025, enrollment further reduced to 12 students, and rankings continued to rise to 467. Over the past two years, rankings have moved forward by approximately 2194 places, indicating significantly intensified competition. The university's enrollment plan for Hainan Province comprehensive category: from 2021 to 2024, it was 23 students each year; in 2025, it sharply dropped to 12 students (a reduction of about 48%); in 2026, it further decreased to 8 students, a reduction of about 33% compared to 2025. Two consecutive years of substantial enrollment reduction have tightened the supply side, exerting upward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northwestern Polytechnical University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 23rd (21st in 2025, 23rd in 2024), firmly among the top universities in the country. It is one of the Seven Sons of National Defense, enjoying extremely high recognition and appeal among examinees. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents (students beaten by local criminal forces, the university accused of favoritism and inaction). However, its overall Douyin popularity ranking is 74th (rated as average), with short video exposure mainly featuring positive content such as speeches by Yu Chengdong and major national projects. Overall public opinion has limited impact on application willingness. Historical admission anomaly files show no record of this university experiencing a cutoff, and the admission trend is relatively stable. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Aerospace Science and Technology A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A+, Mechanical Engineering A, Information and Communication Engineering A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, totaling 7 disciplines rated A- or above (including 3 A+). Flagship majors such as Aerospace, Computer Science, and Materials are highly aligned with current social hot trends, exerting strong appeal to high-scoring examinees.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been consistently highly recommended from 2024 to 2026. Aerospace-related majors maintain high attention due to the background of major national projects. In 2026, the number of college entrance examination examinees in Hainan Province is approximately 78,000 (an increase of about 15.7% from 67,408 in 2025), significantly increasing the examinee pool and further intensifying competition. Northwestern Polytechnical University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, which is relatively far from Hainan Province. However, as a top 985 university among the Seven Sons of National Defense, its cross-provincial appeal is not limited by geography. The university's enrollment proportion in Hainan is extremely small (only 12 students in 2025), making it a typical high-quality university from other provinces, and it is significantly affected by changes in the number of local examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 467 in 2025, the continued reduction of the 2026 enrollment plan to 8 students (tightening supply pushing rankings upward), the substantial increase of about 15.7% in the total number of examinees in Hainan Province (intensified demand competition pushing rankings upward), and the sustained appeal of the university's top 985 level and strong disciplines to high-scoring examinees, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to move forward from 2025 but at a narrower pace. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 394, with a range of 335–453.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Aerospace Class (Smart Three Aerospace Top Talent Class)
- Computer Class (Computer Science National Top Talent Program Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
In 2026, Hainan Province only recruits the above two majors, both of which are the university's top flagship programs, with no medium-difficulty majors. It is recommended to treat both majors as Tier 1 sprint targets.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
None. In 2026, Hainan Province only recruits two top majors, with no relatively easy-to-enter majors.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Northwestern Polytechnical University only recruits two majors in Hainan Province (Aerospace Class Smart Three Aerospace Top Talent Class with 6 students, Computer Class National Top Talent Program Class with 2 students), both of which are the university's top flagship programs. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 335–394 can focus on sprinting; those with rankings better than 335 have a higher chance of admission; candidates with rankings in the 394–453 range can consider it as a sprint choice. Due to the extremely small enrollment (only 8 students), it is recommended that candidates position themselves reasonably based on their own rankings and treat both majors as sprint targets.
